resource.name: ReadLineFromFile
resource.object: Read line from file(lineno, length, codepage)

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: btnQuickActivate.Hint
resource.object: Invalidates cache for the selected item

resource.name: EngineCheck.Failed
resource.object: Health issues. Click for more info.

resource.name: Error.NoEventService
resource.object: Editor manager is unable to get Event Service.

resource.name: SaveBoard.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data before you close the form?

resource.name: NoLayoutEditLicense
resource.object: Required license to edit layouts is not installed.

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the layout.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this layout.

resource.name: edCode.ToolTip
resource.object: Unique code for the layout text. Will be set automatically if no value is provided.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this layout is active or not.

resource.name: mediaTypeLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select media type this layout is going to be designed for.

resource.name: unitTypeLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select unit type which this layout is created for

resource.name: edCopies.ToolTip
resource.object: Define how many copies to print.

resource.name: edLayoutFile.ToolTip
resource.object: Select layout file. Only for certain types of layouts.

resource.name: printServerLookUpEdit.ToolTip
resource.object: Select printer server where the layout is printed. Only for certain types of layouts.

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: Close.Text
resource.object: Some data have changed. Do you want to save the data?

resource.name: mediaTypeLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select media type this layout is going to be designed for.

resource.name: unitTypeLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select unit type which this layout is created for

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this layout.

resource.name: Error.NoLayoutData
resource.object: No data supplied for this layout.

resource.name: LabelSizeInfo.Description
resource.object: Size and unit of the label as defined in the media type. If media type is changed this label have to be reopened.

resource.name: UnitTypeInfo.Description
resource.object: Type of unit the label is designed for.

resource.name: Load.Failed.Text
resource.object: Do you want to continue and load the rest of the components?

resource.name: LabelType.Description
resource.object: Type of layout the label is designed for.

resource.name: UnitPriceFormat.Description
resource.object: Select a unit price format. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PriceFormat.Description
resource.object: Select a price format. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: MoneyRounding.Description
resource.object: Select desired type of money rounding. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintPriceWeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Determines where weight units will appear, relative to the printed label's unit price field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintDiscountPriceWeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Determines where weight units will appear, relative to the printed label's discount unit price field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintPrice.Description
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's price field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintUnitPrice.Description
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's unit price field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintDiscountPrice.Description
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's discount price field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintDiscountUnitPrice.Description
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's discount unit price field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintWeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Determines where weight units will appear, relative to the printed label's weight field. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: MoneyUnit.Description
resource.object: Money unit of price. Example: $, €, kr. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: RfidDataPath.Description
resource.object: Type in the data path for the RFID value. Not supported on WPL/OCM.

resource.name: DecimalSeparator.Description
resource.object: Set the decimal separator to use. PrintEMark.Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: PrintEMark.Description
resource.object: Select if the average weight E mark is printed. Only for WPL/OCM fields.

resource.name: RenderFailed
resource.object: Failed to render preview. Error code:

resource.name: btnShowError.ToolTip
resource.object: Show detail description of the render error.

resource.name: ClearLayout.Text
resource.object: Do you want to clear current layout\nand remove all components from it?

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save current data for:\n'{0}'?

resource.name: Layout.Activated.Error
resource.object: Failed to activate this layout. Layout have not been saved.

resource.name: edRecordId.Hint
resource.object: Type in record id to get data. Click the button to refresh.

resource.name: Error.LoadLayout
resource.object: Unable to open layout to edit.

resource.name: Printing.Text
resource.object: You need to save and activate data before printing.

resource.name: Printing.Question
resource.object: Should the layout be saved and activated?

resource.name: edDpi.Hint
resource.object: Select Dpi to preview the label in.

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the text.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this text.

resource.name: edCode.ToolTip
resource.object: Unique code for the compsite text. Will be set automatically if no value is provided.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this text is active or not.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data for:\n'{0}' ?

resource.name: Sample.Init
resource.object: [Please set sample values to see a sample of the label]

resource.name: RowError.Question
resource.object: Do you want to correct the value?

resource.name: Activate.Failed
resource.object: Failed to activate the composite text.

resource.name: Failed.Reload
resource.object: Current data have not been saved. Can not refresh data.

resource.name: RowError.NoAIDecimals
resource.object: Selected application id required decimals to be set.

resource.name: Activate.GS1.Failed
resource.object: Failed to activate the GS1-128 text.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type the name of label set.

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the label set.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this label set.

resource.name: edCode.ToolTip
resource.object: Unique code for the label set. Will be set automatically if no value is provided.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this label set is active or not.

resource.name: Error.OpenGroupLayout
resource.object: Attempting to edit non label set.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data for:\n'{0}' ?

resource.name: Save.RefToGroup
resource.object: Can not include this group as label set.

resource.name: Layout.Activated.Error
resource.object: Failed to activate this label set. The set have not been saved.

resource.name: Failed.Reload
resource.object: Current data have not been saved. Can not refresh data.

resource.name: Load.Error
resource.object: Unable to open layout group to edit.

resource.name: Error.NotGroupLayout
resource.object: Attempting to edit non layout group

resource.name: unitTypeLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select unit type which this group is created for

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the image.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this image.

resource.name: edCode.ToolTip
resource.object: Unique code for the image. Will be set automatically if no value is provided.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this image is active or not.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data for:\n'{0}' ?

resource.name: Failed.Reload
resource.object: Current data have not been saved. Can not refresh data.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type the name of media type.

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the media type.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this media type set is active or not.

resource.name: edWidth.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines the width of the label.

resource.name: edHeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines the height of the label.

resource.name: btnSelectImage.ToolTip
resource.object: Select background image to use as template when designing preprinted labels.

resource.name: rbOrientation.ToolTip
resource.object: Select label orientation as it is printed.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data for:\n'{0}' ?

resource.name: Failed.Reload
resource.object: Current data have not been saved. Can not refresh data.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type the name of the script.

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the script.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this script.

resource.name: edCode.ToolTip
resource.object: Unique code for the Script. Will be set automatically if no value is provided.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this script set is active or not.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data for:\n'{0}' ?

resource.name: Failed.Reload
resource.object: Current data have not been saved. Can not refresh data.

resource.name: Error.NoFile
resource.object: No file defined to save to.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data for:\n'{0}' ?

resource.name: Layout.Activated.Error
resource.object: Failed to activate this label set. The set have not been saved.

resource.name: Failed.Reload
resource.object: Current data have not been saved. Can not refresh data.

resource.name: btnMenuShow.Hint
resource.object: Select to show active or inactive records or both.

resource.name: Error.NoEventService
resource.object: Explorer is unable to get event service.

resource.name: MediaTypes.ToolTip
resource.object: Browse a list of media types.

resource.name: CompositeText.ToolTip
resource.object: Browse a list of composite texts.

resource.name: Gs1Text.ToolTip
resource.object: Browse a list of GS1-128 texts.

resource.name: Activate.Failed
resource.object: Failed to activate the image list.

resource.name: Layout.Activated.Error
resource.object: Failed to activate this label set. The set have not been saved.

resource.name: Edit.Text
resource.object: Can not edit this type of layout.

resource.name: StartProgram.NoFile
resource.object: No file attached to this layout.

resource.name: StartProgram.Error
resource.object: Unable to open editor for label.

resource.name: Print.ItemNotSelected
resource.object: No item selected or selected item is a folder.

resource.name: Print.Error
resource.object: Unable to print the selected item.

resource.name: ConstructorNotFound
resource.object: Component factory can not find constructor for type:

resource.name: Factory.Hint
resource.object: List of components to add to Innova layouts.

resource.name: btnFilters.Hint
resource.object: Click to configure the data field filter.

resource.name: Factory.ScanningFailed
resource.object: Factory scanning failed while scanning assembly:

resource.name: btnAddDataField.ToolTip
resource.object: Add the found data field to label

resource.name: DeleteImageNode.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove this image?

resource.name: DeleteScript.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove this script?

resource.name: DeleteCompositeText.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove this composite text?

resource.name: barSizeToControlWidth.Hint
resource.object: Makes selected objects the same width

resource.name: barSizeToControlHeight.Hint
resource.object: Make selected objects the same height

resource.name: barSizeToControl.Hint
resource.object: Make selected objects the same size

resource.name: barSizeToGrid.Hint
resource.object: Size the selected objects to grid

resource.name: barHorizSpaceMakeEqual.Hint
resource.object: Space the selected object horizontally equal

resource.name: barHorizSpaceIncrease.Hint
resource.object: Increase the horizontal space on selected objects

resource.name: barHorizSpaceDecrease.Hint
resource.object: Decrese the horizontal space on selected objects

resource.name: barHorizSpaceConcatenate.Hint
resource.object: Remove the horizontal space between selected objects

resource.name: barVertSpaceMakeEqual.Hint
resource.object: Space the selected object vertically equal

resource.name: barVertSpaceIncrease.Hint
resource.object: Increase the vertical space on selected objects

resource.name: barVertSpaceDecrease.Hint
resource.object: Decrese the vertical space on selected objects

resource.name: barVertSpaceConcatenate.Hint
resource.object: Remove the vertical space between selected objects

resource.name: BitmapFont.CreateFailed
resource.object: Failed to create bitmap font list.

resource.name: IsoPages.CreateFailed
resource.object: Failed to create iso pages list.

resource.name: barBtnFitToSize.Hint
resource.object: Set zoom level so the label fits the entire view area.

resource.name: ComponentName.Description
resource.object: Indicates the name to identify the component. Has to be unique.

resource.name: UnitLocation.Description
resource.object: The coordinates of the upper-left corner of the component relative to the upper-left corner of the label in the label units.

resource.name: UnitSize.Description
resource.object: Size of the component in the label unit.

resource.name: BackgroundImage.Description
resource.object: The background image generated by the render engine.

resource.name: AutoSize.Description
resource.object: Defines if this component is resizeable or have fixed size.

resource.name: LabelUnit.Description
resource.object: Unit of the position and size for the component.

resource.name: Locks.Description
resource.object: The locked property determines if we can move or resize the control.

resource.name: LockAspectRatio.Description
resource.object: Lock the aspect ratio when component is resized. Can also be done by holding CTRL key down while resizing.

resource.name: Property.Invalid
resource.object: Value '{0}' is out of range for property '{1}' (should be between {2} and {3}).

resource.name: RenderError
resource.object: Failed to render component. Error code:

resource.name: GeneralRenderError
resource.object: General render error, see system log.

resource.name: ControlVisible.Description
resource.object: Determines whether the item will be visible on the printed label.

resource.name: Border.Description
resource.object: Properties of the border. Borders are not supported in WPL layouts.

resource.name: TextAlignment.Description
resource.object: Defines the alignment of the text.

resource.name: TextId.Description
resource.object: Reference id of the text. Is used when other element refers to this element by using markers like %T and %D. 0 indicates no references. Only supported by WPL/OCM. Valid values are 0 - 999.

resource.name: txtThickness.ToolTip
resource.object: Thickness of the border in pixels.

resource.name: txtCornerSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Size of the corner in design units.

resource.name: txtTopMargin.ToolTip
resource.object: Distance from top border to text.

resource.name: txtBottomMargin.ToolTip
resource.object: Distance from bottom border to text.

resource.name: txtLeftMargin.ToolTip
resource.object: Distance from left border to text.

resource.name: txtRightMargin.ToolTip
resource.object: Distance from right border to text.

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: FormatterParameters.Description
resource.object: Type in extra parameters for formatters with parameters.

resource.name: ConverterParameters.Description
resource.object: Type in extra parameters for converters with parameters.

resource.name: StoredProcedureName.Description
resource.object: Name of the stored procdure to call.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can also be changed in the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: CornerSizeUnit.Description
resource.object: Size of the corner in design units

resource.name: Thickness.Description
resource.object: Thickness of the border in pixels.

resource.name: LineStyle.Description
resource.object: Style of the frame around the box. Wpl supports only solid frames.

resource.name: Thickness.Description
resource.object: Thickness of the line in pixels.

resource.name: LineStyle.Description
resource.object: Style of the line. Wpl only support solid lines.

resource.name: BorderType.Description
resource.object: Type of border to be drawn around the barcode.

resource.name: BorderWidth.Description
resource.object: Width of bounding rectangle or boundary lines.

resource.name: WhitespaceWidth.Description
resource.object: Amount of whitespace to the left and right of the generated barcode.

resource.name: XDimension.Description
resource.object: Width of narrowest bar. Determines the density and with of the whole barcode. Unit is in MILS, 1/1000 of an inch.

resource.name: SampleValue.Description
resource.object: Use sample value if no data path or macro is attached to the barcode to set the barcode value. Markers are also supported here for WPL/OCM.

resource.name: BarcodeHeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Enter a height for the item, in the label unit.

resource.name: BarcodeAnchor.Description
resource.object: Defines how the barcode image is anchored.

resource.name: BarcodeErrorRecover.Description
resource.object: Defines how label is printed if the barcode is invalid.

resource.name: BarcodeMacro.Description
resource.object: Select which GS1-128 text to use for the barcode.

resource.name: BarcodeMacro.Description
resource.object: Select which GS1-128 text to use for the barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Code128 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Code39 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a EAN-13 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a EAN-8 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a UPC-A barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a UPC-E barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Interleaved 2 of 5 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 Databar Limited barcode

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 DataBar Stacked Omnidirectional.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 databar stacked barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 databar truncated barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Datamatrix barcode.

resource.name: Version.Description
resource.object: Datamatrix Code version, size. Need to be parsed to correct enum on usage.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a QR barcode.

resource.name: Version.Description
resource.object: Datamatrix Code version, size. Need to be parsed to correct enum on usage.

resource.name: EncodeEci.Description
resource.object: Whether to include ECI bytes at the beginning of the QR code with the encoding information.

resource.name: ImageName.Description
resource.object: Name of the image. For WPL/OCM layouts this name can also refer to the image file name. Then Image id may not be defined.

resource.name: ImageId.Description
resource.object: Database reference id of the image.

resource.name: addMediaTypeButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Add selected media type(s) to printer's current media support.

resource.name: removeMediaSupportButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Remove selected media type(s) from printer's current media support.

resource.name: confirmLabelStatusButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: rbOrientation.ToolTip
resource.object: Select label orientation as it is printed.

resource.name: Error.SetPrintOrientation
resource.object: Set print orientation in driver failed.

resource.name: Error.SetLogLevel
resource.object: Set log level in driver failed.

resource.name: Error.SetMediaSupport
resource.object: Setting media support for printer failed.

resource.name: btnMenuShow.Hint
resource.object: Select to show active or inactive records or both.

resource.name: btnClone.Hint
resource.object: Add new label printer based on the selected printer.

resource.name: btnPrintTestPage.Hint
resource.object: Prints a test page on the selected printer.

resource.name: AddPrinterFailed
resource.object: An error occured while adding new printer.

resource.name: EditPrinterFailed
resource.object: An error occured while editing printer.

resource.name: ClonePrinterFailed
resource.object: An error occured while cloning printer.

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: edShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Give a short name of the printer.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: A short description of this printer.

resource.name: edCode.ToolTip
resource.object: Unique code for the printer text. Will be set automatically if no value is provided.

resource.name: chkActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if this printer is active or not.

resource.name: lblDriverInfo.Text
resource.object: Select Printer Driver Type For Information.

resource.name: btnAddNew.ToolTip
resource.object: Launch Windows Printer Wizard to add new Windows Printer.

resource.name: btnOpen.ToolTip
resource.object: Open properties for the selected printer.

resource.name: edWindowsPrinters.ToolTip
resource.object: Select an existing Windows Printer or press Add New to install new one.

resource.name: OpenWindowsPrinterPropertiesError.Caption
resource.object: Unable to open properties for printer.

resource.name: LoadPrinterTypesFailed
resource.object: Loading available printers failed. Scanning assembly:

resource.name: edTcpAddress.ToolTip
resource.object: Enter either TCP/IP address or network name.

resource.name: chkSharedConnection.ToolTip
resource.object:
If printer needs to be shared with other printing processes
like a Windows printer, then this must be checked.

NOTE: This will reduce printing performance.

resource.name: CancelJobPrompt
resource.object: Do you want to cancel the selected print job?

resource.name: CancelQueuePrompt
resource.object: Do you want to cancel all print jobs?

resource.name: Print.Error.Reason
resource.object: Invalid unit type or no record selected.

resource.name: noSettingsLabel.Text
resource.object: This printer does not have any settings.

resource.name: Error.SetPrinterSettings
resource.object: Set printer settings in driver failed.

resource.name: Text
resource.object: Data field texts with id references.

resource.name: ValueId.Description
resource.object: Reference id of the string to show.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can also be changed in the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: CornerSizeUnit.Description
resource.object: Size of the corner in design units.

resource.name: Thickness.Description
resource.object: Thickness of the border in pixels.

resource.name: TopMarginUnit.Description
resource.object: Distance from top border to text.

resource.name: BottomMarginUnit.Description
resource.object: Distance from bottom border to text.

resource.name: LeftMarginUnit.Description
resource.object: Distance from left border to text.

resource.name: RightMarginUnit.Description
resource.object: Distance from right border to text.

resource.name: Text
resource.object: Data field texts with id references.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the name of the new item.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a static text.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can also be changed in the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: SampleValue.Description
resource.object: Type sample value to see example of the formatted output if not data record is attached to the label.

resource.name: ValueRequired.Description
resource.object: Set if the value for the field is required. Error image is generated if value is required but missing.

resource.name: WplTextHint
resource.object: Component to add a static WPL text block.

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: chkUseSystemLabel.Text
resource.object: Use system label in data field tree

resource.name: chkFilterDataFields.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to active data field filter.

resource.name: chkUseSystemLabel.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to show localized or system text in data field factory.

resource.name: edRecentSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in how many items to show in the recent list. Min: 4, Max: 20.

resource.name: chkShowDetailsList.ToolTip
resource.object: Select if the grid shall be show when explorere opens. Else the icon view will be shown.

resource.name: btnUpdatePaths.ToolTip
resource.object: Adds process. prefix to data paths in macros, so macros\ncan be used with the new labelling module.

resource.name: Update.Question.Text
resource.object: Do you want to add the missing prefix\nof 'process.' to data path in macro lines?

resource.name: chkAutoSwitchToExplorer.ToolTip
resource.object: Show the explorer automatically when all pages in the designer have been closed.

resource.name: edUnitPriceFormat.ToolTip
resource.object: Select default format for unit price.

resource.name: edMoneyRounding.ToolTip
resource.object: Select default value for rounding of price.

resource.name: edPrintPrice.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's price field

resource.name: edPrintUnitPrice.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's unit price field

resource.name: edPrintDiscountPrice.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's discount price field

resource.name: edPrintDiscountUnitPrice.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where money units will appear, relative to the printed label's discount unit price field

resource.name: edPrintWeightUnit.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where weight units will appear, relative to the printed label's weight field

resource.name: edPrintPriceWeightUnit.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where weight units will appear, relative to the printed label's unit price field

resource.name: edPrintDiscountPriceWeightUnit.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines where weight units will appear, relative to the printed label's discount unit price field

resource.name: edIsoPage.ToolTip
resource.object: Select default iso page to use for bitmap font type.

resource.name: DRE.Failed
resource.object: Failed to get data from Delford Render Engine.

resource.name: edMoneyUnit.ToolTip
resource.object: Money unit of price. Example: $, €, kr.

resource.name: edDecimalSeparator.ToolTip
resource.object: Define default decimal separator for WPL/OCM weights and price.

resource.name: chkPrintEMark.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if the average weight E mark is printed.

resource.name: edLayoutType.ToolTip
resource.object: Define default type to use for new layouts.

resource.name: edUnitType.ToolTip
resource.object: Define default unit type to use for new layouts.

resource.name: chkEnableConverterLog.ToolTip
resource.object: If enabled then output from the Comformat Import Converter will be written to logging directory.

resource.name: chkShowLabelFullSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the label in full size when label is opened in the designer.

resource.name: lblInfo.Text
resource.object: Please provide id of a record for the unit type.

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Confirm changes and close this dialog.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can also be changed in the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: SampleValue.Description
resource.object: Type sample value to see example of the formatted output if not data record is attached to the label.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component showing databound image which id is retrieved from value path.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can be added to the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: SampleValue.Description
resource.object: Type in image database id or name to see example of the image.

resource.name: Title.NoData
resource.object: Please select some layouts to export.

resource.name: Title.DataCollected
resource.object: Data collected and ready to be exported.

resource.name: Error.MacroNotFound
resource.object: Did not find data for macro with id

resource.name: Error.Gs1MacroNotFound
resource.object: Did not find data for GS1-128 macro with id

resource.name: Error.ScriptNotFound
resource.object: Did not find data for script with id

resource.name: Error.TextNotFound
resource.object: Did not find data for text with id

resource.name: Error.ImageNotFound
resource.object: Did not find data for image with id

resource.name: NoteText
resource.object: Note: References to data objects are not exported.

resource.name: BtnText.List.Hint
resource.object: Click to show list of items to export.

resource.name: Title.NoData
resource.object: Please select some layouts to export

resource.name: Error.NoMediaType
resource.object: No media type record found for layout

resource.name: Error.NoLayoutCulture
resource.object: No culture record found for layout

resource.name: Error.NoBaseCulture
resource.object: No culture record found for base text

resource.name: Error.InvalidTextObject
resource.object: Invalid data object for base text

resource.name: wizardLayoutSelecting.Text
resource.object: Select one or more layouts to export

resource.name: ImportBaseText.Hint.Existing
resource.object: Found record with id: {0}\nin the 'base_texts' table.

resource.name: ImportGs1Macro.Hint.Existing
resource.object: Found record with id: {0}\nin the 'proc_gs1macros' table.

resource.name: ImportGs1Macro.UseExisting
resource.object: Using existing GS1-128 macro with id

resource.name: ImportGs1Macro.Imported
resource.object: Imported GS1-128 macro. New id is

resource.name: ImportGs1Macro.LineImported
resource.object: Imported GS1-128 line macro. New id is

resource.name: ImportImage.Hint.Existing
resource.object: Found record with id: {0}\nin the 'base_imagelists' table.

resource.name: ImportImage.ItemImported
resource.object: Imported image item. New id is

resource.name: ImportMacro.Hint.Existing
resource.object: Found record with id: {0}\nin the 'proc_labelmacros' table.

resource.name: ImportMacro.LineImported
resource.object: Imported line macro. New id is

resource.name: ImportMediaType.Hint.Existing
resource.object: Found record with id: {0}\nin the 'proc_mediatypes' table.

resource.name: ImportMediaType.UseExisting
resource.object: Using existing media type with id

resource.name: ImportMediaType.Imported
resource.object: Imported media type. New id is

resource.name: ImportScript.Hint.Existing
resource.object: Found record with id: {0}\nin the 'base_scripts' table.

resource.name: BtnText.List.Hint
resource.object: Click to show list of items to import.

resource.name: edSourceDir.ToolTip
resource.object: Select or type in source directory.

resource.name: FolderBrowse.Text
resource.object: Select folder with layouts to import.

resource.name: chkIncludeDatabase.ToolTip
resource.object: Check this mark if importer shall also lookup layouts in database which refere to files.

resource.name: wizardWelcoming.Text
resource.object: Select type of layout to import

resource.name: RemoveImage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove selected image(s)?

resource.name: AddDpiImage.Question
resource.object: Do you want to autocreate image for {0} DPI resolution?

resource.name: AddDpiImages.Question
resource.object: Do you want to autocreate images for {0} DPI resolutions?

resource.name: Title.NoData
resource.object: Please select some data to import

resource.name: BtnText.FixButton.Hint
resource.object: Click to open the label in designer to fix the errors and save the label.

resource.name: Title.ImportErrorFix
resource.object: Error In Imported Label Which Need To Be Fixed

resource.name: MoneyUnit.Description
resource.object: Enter a desired money unit symbol.

resource.name: MoneyRounding.Description
resource.object: Select desired type of Money Rounding.

resource.name: PrintMoneyUnit.Description
resource.object: Determines where Money Unit will appear, relative to the printed price.

resource.name: PrintWeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Determines where weight unit will appear, relative to the printed price.

resource.name: ConstructorNotFound
resource.object: WPL Component factory can not find constructor for type:

resource.name: Factory.Hint
resource.object: List of components to add to WPL layouts.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a standard WPL barcode.

resource.name: SampleValue.Description
resource.object: Use sample value if no data path or macro is attached to the barcode to set the barcode value. Markers are also supported here for WPL/OCM.

resource.name: BarcodeHeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Enter a height for the item, in the label unit.

resource.name: Inverted.Description
resource.object: If this component is inverted or not.

resource.name: OffsetDays.Description
resource.object: Number of days to offset the date from the system date.

resource.name: OffsetHours.Description
resource.object: Number of hours to offset the date from the system date.

resource.name: DateFormat.Description
resource.object: Enter the Comformat meta-characters to format the date.

resource.name: ClockLinked.Description
resource.object: Set the date to be clock linked. If not linked then this field will show the sample value.

resource.name: Language.Description
resource.object: Select language to be used to translate the dateline texts.

resource.name: PrintWeightUnit.Description
resource.object: Determines if weight unit will appear, relative to the printed weight value

resource.name: FlagDigit.Description
resource.object: Select the presence and location of a flag digit.

resource.name: CheckLine.Description
resource.object: Select whether the barcode has a checkline.

resource.name: PrintHumanReadable.Description
resource.object: Determines whether a human readble string is printed.

resource.name: ScanCheck.Description
resource.object: Select whether the scan check is enabled.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Code128 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Code39 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Code93 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a EAN-128 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a EAN-13 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a EAN-8 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Interleaved 2 of 5 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a PDF-417 barcode.

resource.name: AspectRatio.Description
resource.object: Select an aspect ratio. 0.5 makes the barcode's width twice its height.

resource.name: YHeight.Description
resource.object: Enter a desired bar height scaling factor (typically 3.0 or 4.0).

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a RSS-14 barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a RSS-14 (Limited) barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a RSS-14 (Omni) barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a RSS-14 (Stacked) barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a RSS-14 (Truncated) barcode.

resource.name: BarcodeMacro.Description
resource.object: Select which GS1 composite text to use for the barcode.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can be added to the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: BarcodeMacro.Description
resource.object: Select which composite text to use for the barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a QR barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a Datamatrix barcode.

resource.name: DatamatrixSize.Description
resource.object: Select size of datamatrix for the barcode

resource.name: BarcodeSize.Description
resource.object: Enter a size for the barcode in label units.

resource.name: DataPath.Description
resource.object: Data path of the field. A datapath can be added to the component by holding the CTRL while dragging datafield on top of the component and then released.

resource.name: BarcodeMacro.Description
resource.object: Select which composite text to use for the barcode.

resource.name: Gs1Mode.Description
resource.object: Should input data be encoded as GS1-128 format.

resource.name: LabelRotation.Description
resource.object: Enter a rotation value, in degrees

resource.name: LabelRotation.Invalid
resource.object: Value '{0}' is out of range for property '{1}' (should be between -200 and 200).

resource.name: LabelPosition.Description
resource.object: Enter a position in mm. A negative value indicates reference from trailing edge.

resource.name: LabelPosition.Invalid
resource.object: Value '{0}' is out of range for property '{1}' (should be between 0 and 65535).

resource.name: WplValidate.StandardBarcodeExists
resource.object: You are only allowed to add one standard barcode to the label.

resource.name: WplValidate.2DBarcodeExists
resource.object: You are only allowed to add up to two 2D barcode to the label.

resource.name: WplValidate.NoMoreBarcodes
resource.object: You are only allowed to add 4 non standard barcodes to the label.

resource.name: WplValidate.FieldProhibited
resource.object: You are not allowed to put this data field on the label for selected weight price action.

resource.name: WplValidate.NoMoreDataFields
resource.object: You are not allowed to add more of this data field on the label for selected weight price action.

resource.name: WplValidate.NoMoreDatelines
resource.object: You are only allowed to have max 4 dateline on the label.

resource.name: WplValidate.NoMoreSystemFields
resource.object: An instance of this component already exists on the label.

resource.name: WplValidate.FieldRequired
resource.object: This data field is required to be on the label for selected weight price action.

resource.name: Error.InvalidWeighPriceAction
resource.object: The weigh price action can't be NOT_SET

resource.name: Error.InvalidIds
resource.object: Following components have invalid text ids. Valid ids are 0 - {0}.

resource.name: Error.WrongUnitType
resource.object: The layouts unit type has to be Item or Pack.

resource.name: Error.BitmapOutOfBounds
resource.object: The bitmap {0} is outside the label.

resource.name: lblInfoText.Text
resource.object: If you choose to continue, the items above will have to be added or deleted. Items which are unnecessary are removed. Please confirm his action.

resource.name: lblInfoText.Text
resource.object:
Changing the size of the media type will influence following layouts.
You need to manually open each layout, adjust its content and then save it.
Layouts which elements fall outside the new label size are specially marked in the list.

resource.name: btnCopy.ToolTip
resource.object: Copies the layouts list to the clipboard. You can also select items in the list and hit CTRL+C to copy only the selected items.

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Click on this button to continue with saving the media type.

resource.name: Bitmap.Required
resource.object: Following image needs to be added to Innova

resource.name: DuplicateIds.Info
resource.object: These components have the same text number which need to be fixed manually.

resource.name: Title.NoData
resource.object: Please select some data to import

resource.name: Title.ErrorData
resource.object: The file selected have some error and can not be imported

resource.name: Title.Text
resource.object: Define layout to import Comformat to

resource.name: LabelInfo.WH
resource.object: Label being imported has the width and height as

resource.name: Info.SelectLabelSize
resource.object: Important to select media type with correct label size.

resource.name: Info.LabelSizeUsage
resource.object: Label size is used when the coordinates are converted.

resource.name: Info.CheckLabel
resource.object: Please review the label after it have been imported.

resource.name: ImportError.NoFileData
resource.object: Unable to get layout data from the file.

resource.name: ImportFinished.WithWarning
resource.object: Layout imported with some elements needing additional attention.

resource.name: ImportFinished.Error
resource.object: Error found in label at import! Label is not stored to the database.

resource.name: ImportFinished.ErrorResult
resource.object: Clicking the 'Fix Label' button will open the label in the designer where it can be corrected.

resource.name: ImportError.ObjRefError
resource.object: "Please see the system log for detailed information.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a ITF 14 barcode

resource.name: Render.Failed
resource.object: Failed to render preview of element

resource.name: Render.BarcodeFormatFailed
resource.object: Failed to set barcode format for

resource.name: btnSave.ToolTip
resource.object: Save the report to a file.

resource.name: ZeroCount
resource.object: Please select one or more rows

resource.name: DownloadPrompt
resource.object: Do you want to download selected entries?

resource.name: DownloadSinglePrompt
resource.object: Do you want to download selected entries?

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 Expanded.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a RSS-14 (Expanded Stacked) barcode.

resource.name: ExpandedWidth.Description
resource.object: Enter an expanded width for the RSS expanded stacked barcode.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a GS1-128 Expanded and Stacked.

resource.name: Columns.Description
resource.object: Number of columns to display (0 = automatic, max 9).

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a EAN-14 barcode.

resource.name: InfoImport
resource.object: Selected image is to big to be used with labelling. Allowed size is: {0} byte.

resource.name: btnSaveImage.Hint
resource.object: Saves the selected image(s) to a file.

resource.name: RemoveImage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove selected image?

resource.name: AddDpiImage.Question
resource.object: Do you want to autocreate image for {0} DPI resolution?

resource.name: AddDpiImages.Question
resource.object: Do you want to autocreate images for {0} DPI resolutions?

resource.name: RemoveImage.TextMulti
resource.object: Do you want to remove selected images?

resource.name: btnColorConvert.Hint
resource.object: To convert images to monochrome or grayscaled image.

resource.name: Hint
resource.object: Component to add a PDF-417 barcode.

resource.name: ErrorCorrection.Description
resource.object: Select error correction level for the barcode.
